privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic resume anonymization exercise for an Apache OpenOffice Writer environment. Input file /home/ga/Documents/candidate_raw.odt contains PII for candidate Marcus Reynolds including full name, San Francisco address, phone 415-555-0199, email marcus.reynolds@email.com, and LinkedIn URL linkedin.com/in/mreynolds. The task requires producing output file /home/ga/Documents/Candidate_CRA-994_Blind.odt by anonymizing all PII and applying specific document formatting: 4 Heading 1 styles to section headers (Professional Summary, Technical Skills, Professional Experience, Education), 3 Heading 2 styles to job titles (Senior Cloud Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer, Systems Administrator), converting skills to a 2-column table, adding footer with 'Confidential Representation - Apex Systems', and adding 'CRA-994' as the candidate identifier. All metadata claims about file paths, PII terms, required terms, and style counts have been verified against the setup scripts and task description.
